name: Loans to Shareholders
desc: Loans made to shareholders of the corporation

name: Fixed Assets:Buildings
desc: Buildings, permanently attached fixtures, and improvements on company-owned (or leased) land

name: Fixed Assets:Land
desc: Land owned by the company

name: Fixed Assets:Furniture/Equipment
desc: Furniture and equipment with useful life exceeding one year

name: Fixed Assets:Leasehold Improvements
desc: Improvements to leased building space

name: Fixed Assets:Vehicles
desc: Business automobiles and trucks, registered in the name of the business

name: Fixed Assets:Intangibles
desc: Intangible assets

name: K-1 Entity Ownership:Partnership Entity
desc: Capital account tracking for partnership K-1s (RENAME)

name: Payroll Liabilities:Employee Benefits
desc: Employee benefits

name: Payroll Liabilities:Tax Liability
desc: Payroll tax liabilities outstanding

name: Payroll Liabilities:Intercompany Loan Payable
desc: Outstanding loans between commonly owned business entities or subsidiaries

name: Refundable Customer Deposits
desc: Deposits refundable to customers

name: Sales Tax Payable
desc: Unpaid sales taxes. Amounts charged on sales, but not yet paid to the government

name: Other Current Liabilities:Line of Credit
desc: Line of credit available to business

name: Other Current Liabilities:Loan Payable
desc: Loans outstanding expected to be paid off within 12 months

name: Opening Balance Equity
desc: Opening balances during setup post to this account. The balance of this account should be zero

name: Sharehodler Capital:Common Stock
desc: Common stock allocated at par

name: Shareholder Capital:APIC
desc: Additional paid in capital by shareholders in excess of par

name: Shareholder Capital:Distributions
desc: Distributions paid to shareholders out of the business

name: Retained Earnings
desc: Undistributed earnings of the corporation

name: Net Sales:Primary Sales Revenue
desc: Track sales of primary goods and services of the business

name: Net Sales:Returns / Refunds
desc: Returns and refunds from customers or clients

name: Net Sales:Other Sales / Income
desc: Track other sales or income from business operations

name: K-1 Income:Partnership Entity Income
desc: Partnership K-1 Box 1

name: Cost of Goods Sold
desc: All costs associated with capitalized inventory once sold

name: Advertising and Promotion:Business Gifts
desc: Gifts paid to customers, contractors, etc.

name: Advertising and Promotion:Website Expense
desc: Web development, maintenance, domain name, hosting, etc.

name: Advertising and Promotion:Web-based / Pay-Per Click Ads
desc: Google Ads and other placed ads across the web tat drives traffic to your website

name: Advertising and Promotion:Marketing Expense
desc: All other Marekting, Advertising, and Promotional Expenses

name: Advertising and Promotion:Conferences / Tradeshows
desc: All exhibiting and presentation expenses, except for travel

name: Advertising and Promotion:Promotional Products / Giveaways
desc: Business cards, flyers, banners, promotional products with company logo, stationary

name: Advertising and Promotion:Social Media Marketing
desc: Facebook, YouTube, X, Instagram, and/or any other social media based marketing

name: Automobile Expenses
desc: Actual auto expenses incurred for vehicles owned in the name of the business

name: Mileage Reimbursements
desc: Mileage reimbursements for mileage rate auto deduction via accountable plan

name: Parking & Tolls
desc: Expenses related to parking and highway tolls for business vehicles or business travel

name: Merchant / Credit Card Fees
desc: Merchant and credit card transactions fees

name: Bank Service Charges
desc: Bank service charges, monthly account fees and annual credit card fees

name: License / Permits
desc: Business licenses, permits, and other business-related fees

name: Meals (50%)
desc: Business meals w/ customers, vendors, partners

name: Meals (100%)
desc: Food purchased for customers or clients to be eaten at a physical office space or marketing event

name: Continuing Education / Training
desc: Seminars, educational expenses and employee development, not including travel

name: Insurance Expenses:General Liability Insurance
desc: General liability insurance premiums

name: Insurance Expenses:Non-Officer Health Insurance
desc: Employee health insurance premiums

name: Insurance Expenses:Equipment Insurance
desc: Insurance premiums paid on business equipment or assets

name: Insurance Expenses:Life / Disability Insurance
desc: Employee life and disability insurance premiums for Non-Officers

name: Insurance Expenses:Worker's Compensation
desc: Worker's compensation insurance premiums

name: Office Expenses:Janitorial Expense
desc: Janitorial expenses and cleaning supplies

name: Office Expenses:Postage & Delivery
desc: Postage, courier, and pickup and delivery services

name: Office Expenses:Printing & Reproduction
desc: Printing, copies, and other reproduction expenses

name: Office Expenses:Repairs & Maintenance
desc: Incidental repairs and maintenance of business assets that do not add to the improvement value

name: Office Expenses:Professional Dues
desc: Subscriptions and membership dues for civic, service, professional, trade organizations

name: Office Expenses:Occupancy Expense
desc: Accountable plan reimbursements for direct business use of home

name: Utilities
desc: Any utilities paid for actual office space (not home office), such as electric, gas, etc.

name: Legal & Professional Fees:Accountant
desc: Amounts paid for bookkeeping, accounting or tax services

name: Legal & Professional Fees:Legal
desc: Amounts paid to attornys or lawyers for legal services

name: Subcontractors:1099 Required
desc: Individuals performing services that will receive a 1099

name: Subcontractors:Corporations / non-1099
desc: Corporations or individual performing services that will not receive a 1099

name: Subcontractors:Casual Labor < $600
desc: Paid to individuals that do not add up to $600 or more for the whole year

name: Payroll Expenses:Officer Compensation:Wages
desc: Gross wages paid to owner/officers of S-Corporation

name: Payroll Expenses:Officer Compensation:Health Insurance
desc: Health insurance paid to owner/officers of S-Corporation

name: Payroll Expenses:Officer Compensation:HSA
desc: HSA contributions made on behalf of owner/officers of S-Corporation

name: Payroll Expenses:Officer Compensation:HRA
desc: HRA contributions made on behalf of owner/officer of S-Corporation

name: Payroll Expenses:Officer Compensation:Other
desc: Other fringe benefits paid on behalf of owner/officer of S-Corporation

name: Payroll Expenses:Non-Officer Wages
desc: Payroll expenses paid to employees (non-officers)

name: Payroll Expenses:Payroll Taxes
desc: Payroll Taxes paid to IRS, State, and local goverments

name: Payroll Expenses:Payroll Processing Fees
desc: Paid to payroll processor service

name: Payroll Expenses:Other Payroll Related Expenses
desc: Any other payroll related expenses. Do not use for subcontactors

name: Management Fee
desc: Paid to outside contractor for management services

name: Rent Expense
desc: Rent paid for company offices or other structures used in the business

name: Software & Subscriptions
desc: Business software and recurring online subscriptions

name: Security & Encryption
desc: Costs incurred to increase business security and/or encryption

name: Supplies < $200
desc: Supplies and materials under $200

name: Non-Capitalized Assets < $2500
desc: Asset purchase under $2,500 elected to be expensed rather than capitalized

name: Travel Expenses:Airfare
desc: Air Plane Tickets, Airline Fees, Laugage Fees

name: Travel Expenses:Lodging / Hotels
desc: Any cost of overnight stay

name: Travel Expenses:Transportation during Travel
desc: All non-airfare transportation services while traveling for business

name: Travel Expenses:Travel-Related Reimbursements
desc: Any other travel expenses reimbursed to employees in exchange of receipts and/or expense reports

name: Required Communications
desc: Any necessary required communication expenses, such as cell phone, internet, etc.

name: Startup Expense
desc: Expenses directly related to launching a new business venture or revenue stream within an existing business ($5,000 max)

name: Interest Expense
desc: Interest payments on business loans, credit card balances, or other business debt

name: Business / Franchise Tax Paid
desc: Business or franchise taxes paid on behalf of the business entity; NOT personal / individual taxes

name: Pension / Profit Sharing:Defined Benefit
desc: Contributions to a defined benefit pension

name: Pension / Profit Sharing:Profit Sharing
desc: Employer portion of contributions to retirement plan

name: Pension / Profit Sharing:401(h) Contributions
desc: Contributions to a 401(h) plan

name: Inventory Expensed under 471(c)
desc: Inventory costs elected to be expensed IRC Sec 471(c)

name: Accountable Plan Reimbursements
desc: Any expenses reimbursed to employees through an IRS-approved accountable plan

name: Interest Income
desc: Interest earned on bank accounts and loans

name: Insurance Proceeds Received
desc: Monies received from insurance companies in compensation for casualty losses

name: Credit Card Points / Rewards
desc: Cash back, purchase discounts, and credit card payment credits due to points, miles, etc.

name: Proceeds from Sale of Assets
desc: Monies received from sale of fixed assets

name: K-1 Separately Stated Income:Guaranteed Payment (Services)
desc: Partnership K-1 Box 4a

name: K-1 Separately Stated Income:Interest Income
desc: Partnership K-1 Box 5

name: K-1 Separately Stated Income:Short-Term Cap Gain/Loss
desc: Partnership K-1 Box 8

name: K-1 Separately Stated Income:Long-Term Cap Gain/Loss
desc: Partnership K-1 Box 9a

name: Depreciation Expense
desc: Depreciation on equipment, buildings and improvements

name: Fixed Assets:Accumulated Depreciation
desc: Accumulated depreciation on equipment, buildings and improvements

name: Amortization Expense
desc: Amortization on intangible assets

name: Fixed Assets:Intangibles:Accumulated Amortization
desc: Accumulated amortization on intangible assets

name: Section 179 Deduction
desc: Separately stated Section 179 deduction by corporation

name: Charitable Contributions
desc: Separately stated charitable contributions by corporation

name: Nondeductible Expenses:Entertainment
desc: Non-deductible amounts paid for business entertainment

name: Nondeductible Expenses:Penalties & Fines
desc: Non-deductible amounts paid penalties and fines

name: K-1 Separately Stated Deductions:Section 179 Deduction
desc: Partnership K-1 Box 12

name: K-1 Separately Stated Deductions:Nondeductible Partner Expense
desc: Partnership K-1 Box 18

name: Transactions > $2500 (TEMP)
desc: Temporary holding account for transactions > $2,500 that may need to be capitalized

name: Uncategorized Transactions
desc: Uncategorized transactions needing additional detail from client
